channel.title: analytics on oltdaniel
channel.description: Recent content in analytics on oltdaniel

item.title: Counting Instead of Tracking
item.description: Analyzing the traffic a website receives, is a key part in marketing to understand and highlight the group of consumers and their interests. However, the way how it has been implemented in the recent years has evolved from counting single requests to tracking the use across multiple websites. For a short moment I decided against this trend and went back to the old classics of website analysis. I start counting the unique requests, instead of tracking the user across our website.
